description: A designed White House 'rogues-gallery' offender card against a solid black background. At the top, in large bold orange italic all-caps, is the word 'ARRESTED.' Below it sits a large rounded-corner white panel containing a tight, frontal close-up photograph (mugshot/booking style) of a man with dark hair, heavy eyebrows, and a mustache, looking directly at the camera against a blurred institutional interior. Beneath the photo, inside the white panel, bold black all-caps type reads 'ILLEGAL ALIEN.' Directly below the panel, white sans-serif text lists the charges: 'Third-degree rape, Unlawful imprisonment, Second-degree assault with a deadly weapon.' At the bottom center is the small white line-art White House emblem next to the engraved serif wordmark 'The WHITE HOUSE.' The high-contrast black/orange/white palette and large mugshot mimic a booking/wanted card. The propaganda technique personalizes immigration enforcement by spotlighting a single accused individual labeled 'ILLEGAL ALIEN' with severe alleged crimes, reinforcing the tweet's hardline message ('Criminal illegal aliens will be arrested. They will be deported. No exceptions.'), targeting a general audience to build support for mass deportation by associating illegal immigration with violent crime.
notable_text: ARRESTED | ILLEGAL ALIEN | Third-degree rape, Unlawful imprisonment, Second-degree assault with a deadly weapon | The WHITE HOUSE
